subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter, which was a reflection of thy pen's supplication and entreaty, was understood in its true meaning [3.5s]... ...the user, the buyer and the seller [of opium] are all deprived of the bounty and grace of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که اثر خامه تضرع و ابتهال بود مضمونش مفهوم گشت دلالت
subcodes.subjects: @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @names and attributes of God, @law of Huququ'llah, @chastisement and requital
